# Alpha Knowledge

This concept page is the canonical entry for the **alpha** topic. Use
this page when you need a precise definition of alpha in the OKF
ecosystem. Alpha shares terminology with beta and gamma but
distinguishes itself by its narrower scope.

For related concepts see [/concepts/beta.md](/concepts/beta.md).
